title: Rebuild 222 poster question
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by hyperion » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:21 pm I am interested in buying this 2.22 poster, but I noticed the 27x40 version has an odd black box with red text on it that is not present on the 11x17 version. Will that be on the actual poster? http://www.amazon.com/Evangelion-Advance-Japanese-Hayashibara-Sakamoto/dp/B003TIYZI8/ref=sr_1_28?ie=UTF8&qid=1287109117&sr=8-28

[]: Re: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:01 pm hyperion wrote: I am interested in buying this 2.22 poster, but I noticed the 27x40 version has an odd black box with red text on it that is not present on the 11x17 version. Will that be on the actual poster? http://www.amazon.com/Evangelion-Advance-Japanese-Hayashibara-Sakamoto/dp/B003TIYZI8/ref=sr_1_28?ie=UTF8&qid=1287109117&sr=8-28

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 16, 2010 4:19 pm According to another review on Amazon, that company(?) has really crappy poster quality. Buy at your own risk, I suppose.

[]: Re: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun Oct 17, 2010 10:44 am Ornette wrote: I doubt it'll be on the actual poster. That black box was an adhesive on the theatrical program (which has that image on the front) that warned you not to look inside the program book until after you've come out o the theatre (and having seen the movie).

Article: Rebuild 222 poster question
[]: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by hyperion » Thu Oct 14, 2010 9:21 pm I am interested in buying this 2.22 poster, but I noticed the 27x40 version has an odd black box with red text on it that is not present on the 11x17 version. Will that be on the actual poster? http://www.amazon.com/Evangelion-Advance-Japanese-Hayashibara-Sakamoto/dp/B003TIYZI8/ref=sr_1_28?ie=UTF8&qid=1287109117&sr=8-28

[]: Re: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 14, 2010 11:01 pm hyperion wrote: I am interested in buying this 2.22 poster, but I noticed the 27x40 version has an odd black box with red text on it that is not present on the 11x17 version. Will that be on the actual poster? http://www.amazon.com/Evangelion-Advance-Japanese-Hayashibara-Sakamoto/dp/B003TIYZI8/ref=sr_1_28?ie=UTF8&qid=1287109117&sr=8-28

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 16, 2010 4:19 pm According to another review on Amazon, that company(?) has really crappy poster quality. Buy at your own risk, I suppose.

[]: Re: Rebuild 2.22 poster question             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun Oct 17, 2010 10:44 am Ornette wrote: I doubt it'll be on the actual poster. That black box was an adhesive on the theatrical program (which has that image on the front) that warned you not to look inside the program book until after you've come out o the theatre (and having seen the movie).
